text:
The Paradigm Shift: Using AI to Defend Against AI
AI is being misused. It's helping fraudsters to trick, steal, and spread lies faster than ever before.
But the same AI can be our greatest defense.
We can use it to spot fraud, stop attacks, and protect people.

layout.background: white with blue icons and green side bands
